text.title: Function Calling Patterns Core Rules
text.summary: Seven testable rules for cross-vendor function-calling design.

rule.statement: Visible tool count per request ≤ 20. Above this, models pick incorrectly; introduce a tool router that surfaces only a relevant subset.
rule.rationale: Both Anthropic and OpenAI selection accuracy degrades sharply past ~20 candidates; routing limits the choice set.

rule.statement: Validate LLM-supplied arguments against the tool JSON Schema BEFORE executing. Reject on schema mismatch; return the validation error as content so the model can retry.
rule.rationale: LLMs hallucinate fields, types, and enum values; pre-execution validation prevents action-on-bad-data.

rule.statement: Cap the agent loop at 10-20 iterations. On cap, return a partial result with the reason and log for triage.
rule.rationale: Unbounded loops are quota incidents in disguise; the cap converts them into observable bugs.

rule.statement: When the model returns multiple tool calls in one turn, dispatch them concurrently (ThreadPool / asyncio) and return all tool results in one user message.
rule.rationale: Vendors emit parallel tool calls specifically to amortise latency; sequential dispatch defeats the optimisation.

rule.statement: Recoverable tool errors (timeout, not-found, retryable HTTP) returned as content/text; only terminal errors (auth fail, schema violation) use the vendor's `is_error` channel.
rule.rationale: Errors returned as content let the model self-correct (try a different arg, ask the user); is_error stops the loop.

rule.statement: One request uses one vendor's tool format. Do not mix Anthropic and OpenAI shapes in the same call; cross-vendor portability happens at the adapter layer.
rule.rationale: Vendors validate against their own shape; mixing produces opaque API errors.

rule.statement: Each tool entry carries a `version` and a `schema_id`. Schema changes bump version; callers pin to a version for replayable behaviour.
rule.rationale: Tools evolve; version pinning prevents silent breakage across deploys.

rule.statement: Preconditions hold → wire tools + validator + loop + router per the procedure.
No external action AND no structured output → skip; pure text completion suffices.
